microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation standard.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.
Built an internal **AI agent** and restructured planning workflows to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, scaling team leverage without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.
Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ discovery sessions** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps and validate solution fit.
Cut documentation lookup time by **83%** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating content to an AI-powered semantic search tool, directly improving developer workflow efficiency.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a solution roadmap to automate critical paths and eliminate recurring operational toil.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface automation gaps and track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact investments with data-backed confidence.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process.
Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing release friction.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, conducting discovery with stakeholders to redesign the CRM process from the ground up.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile for the target customer segment.
Identified and sealed margin leaks by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved leadership decision-making.
